zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Treadway於1555年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾潔利時，他的父親Henry Treadway23歲，母親Agnes Rockley19歲。他於1581年與Margaret Fisher在英國亨廷格多史爾巴登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Treadway于1555年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾潔利时，他的父亲Henry Treadway23岁，母亲Agnes Rockley19岁。他于1581年与Margaret Fisher在英国亨廷格多史爾巴登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Treadway was born in 1555, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Henry Treadway, was 23 and his mother, Agnes Rockley, was 19. He married Margaret Fisher in 1581, in Buckden, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Treadway est né en 1555, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Treadway, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rockley, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fisher en 1581, à Buckden, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Treadway 1555 in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Treadway 23 und seine Mutter Agnes Rockley 19. Er hat 1581 in Buckden, Huntingdonshire, England Margaret Fisher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Treadway è nato il nel 1555 nel Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Treadway, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Rockley, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fisher nel 1581, nel Buckden, Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Treadwayが1555年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで生まれた時，父Henry Treadwayは23歳，母Agnes Rockleyは19歳であった。1581年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアブクデンでMargaret Fisherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Treadway(이)가 1555년 영국 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Treadway(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Rockley(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1581년 영국 헌틴그도실르 벅든에서 Margaret Fisher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Treadway родился в 1555 г. в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Treadway было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rockley, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fisher в 1581 г. в местности буккден, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Treadway nació en 1555, en Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Treadway, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnes Rockley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Fisher en 1581, en Buckden, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
